query: SELECT ss.id, ss.programId, ss.slotDate, ss.startTime, ss.endTime, ss.isAvailable, p.type FROM schedule_slots ss JOIN programs p ON ss.programId = p.id WHERE p.type = 'private_lesson' ORDER BY ss.slotDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute SELECT ss.id, ss.programId, ss.slotDate, ss.startTime, ss.endTime, ss.isAvailable, p.type FROM schedule_slots ss JOIN programs p ON ss.programId = p.id WHERE p.type = 'private_lesson' ORDER BY ss.slotDate DESC LIMIT 10;
